text.title: Blameless Retro — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the retro record shape. Facilitator or supporting agent producing the record must satisfy this contract before publishing.

field.name: category
field.format: enum: detection-gap | comms-gap | mitigation-gap | tooling-gap | knowledge-gap | dependency-failure | other

forbidden.pattern: contributing_factors entries that name individuals as the cause ("Alex made a mistake", "Bob forgot")
action_items with target_date in the past at publish time OR > 90 days out
retro record with fewer than 3 contributing_factors
meta_round_notes empty (the meta round is non-skippable per r4)
facilitator listed as also-a-direct-responder of the incident
action items that prescribe individual training as the sole fix for a systemic gap ("Bob will be more careful")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cluster near-identical action items into one composite item with an explanation of the grouping.
Split a too-large action item ("redesign the deploy pipeline") into a discovery action with date + a follow-up action item to be defined post-discovery.
Reference prior retro action items if they are still in-flight and relevant; do not create duplicate items.

list.item: Facilitator name listed and is not a responder (r1, r4 implicit)
Every action item has a single named owner + a date <= 90 days (r3)
Language scan (scripts/scan-transcript-for-blame.py) reports zero person-as-subject phrases in factors AND action items (r1)
